suite: BF6 Meta Configurator — Self-Test Suite v1

assertions.A1_LANG_QUESTION: First response includes both 'English' and 'Español' options simultaneously
assertions.A2_THREE_QUESTIONS: Step 0.2 message contains exactly 3 labeled questions: Platform, Class, Playstyle — in a single message
assertions.A3_STEP0_BEFORE_STEP1: Step 0.2 questions are generated BEFORE any web search or Step 1 begins
assertions.A4_WEAPON_NAMES_NON_EMPTY: At least 1 weapon per category has a real weapon name (not placeholder, not blank)
assertions.A5_ATTACHMENTS_FILLED: Each weapon has all attachment slots populated — inferred (*) is acceptable, blank is not
assertions.A6_SOURCE_BADGE: Each weapon entry carries a source tier: CONFIRMED, COMMUNITY, INFERRED, or PENDING
assertions.A7_CONTROLLER_PLATFORM_MATCH: Controller settings section content matches the platform specified in the scenario
assertions.A8_PLAYSTYLE_REFLECTED: Optic choices and attachment rationale reflect the playstyle in the scenario (CQC -> red dot/holo; Long Range -> 4x+; Versatile -> 2-3x)

scenarios.label: PC / All classes / Versatile (default path, English)
